eu_ai_act.rationale: This system interacts directly with natural persons (chatbot/conversational AI) and owes them a transparency disclosure under Article 50, even though it makes no consequential decisions under Annex III or Colorado SB 205.

nist_ai_rmf.rationale: Conversational AI interacting directly with consumers requires elevated attention to measurement and management of response quality and escalation, though it does not rise to consequential-decision-making critical attention.

colorado_sb_205.rationale: System does not make or substantially factor into a consequential decision affecting consumer life opportunities; routine customer service interaction only.

regulatory_exposure_summary: Moderate regulatory exposure under EU AI Act Limited Risk (Article 50 transparency obligations); no high-risk trigger under Annex III or Colorado SB 205.
